title: Lemon Crispy Russian Turkey Casserole
description: A bright, citrusy casserole with tender turkey mince, crisp lemon topping simmered gently in a copper pot.
instructions: Heat the copper pot over medium heat and add the tablespoon of olive oil until shimmering.
Toss in the diced onion and minced garlic, cooking until the onion becomes translucent.
Stir in the ground turkey, breaking it apart with a spoon, and cook until it loses its pink color.
Sprinkle paprika, salt, and pepper, then pour in lemon juice and stir in the lemon zest.
Let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
While the mixture simmers, whisk the egg whites until soft peaks form and spoon them over the top to create a crisp layer.
Cover the pot and place it in a bain‑marie over a pan of simmering water to finish cooking gently.
Once the top is golden and firm, remove from heat, garnish with fresh herbs, and serve hot.
